title: Dense Vegetation
description:
Having taken the wrong path for a good while, you find yourself in a thick jungle of [green]ferns[/green], [green]shrubs[/green], and [green]vines[/green]. Especially [green]vines[/green]. Exhaustion sets in, and a dark thought comes to mind:

[sine][purple]“You are lost, unprepared, and the inevitability of death is approaching.”[/purple][/sine]

What do you do?

options.title: Rest
options.description: Heal [green][rest site amount][/green] HP. Fight some [red]enemies[/red].

notes:
The [red]8[/red] HP loss from [gold]Trudge On[/gold] is [red]Unblockable[/red] and [red]Unpowered[/red] — it cannot be reduced by powers, artifacts, or relics. The [gold]Gold[/gold] amount is randomly determined each run: [blue]61-99[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

Choosing [gold]Rest[/gold] heals you using the standard rest site calculation, then immediately forces a combat encounter. You enter a new page with only the [gold]Fight![/gold] option. The enemy is DenseVegetationEventEncounter (has no rewards), and the event ends after combat regardless of outcome.
